summary: Frontend-only Playwright testing of LUMI AI hero landing page completed. All 10 requested test cases passed. No console/page errors observed.

issues: Sonner toast position 'top-right' visually overlaps the navbar 'Build With AI' button while a toast is on-screen (e.g., right after clicking the CTA). Not blocking — toast auto-dismisses — but consider 'top-center' or offsetting the toaster to avoid covering the CTA pill.

action_items: (Optional) Reposition Sonner Toaster (e.g., top-center or add offset) so toasts don't overlap the navbar 'Build With AI' button on wide screens.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx is ~420 lines and component-self-contained — fine for now, but consider extracting CommandBar, MetricsGrid, CinemaTags, LandmarkImage subcomponents if the file grows.
useTypewriter hook is clean and uses lazy initializer for particles (good for SSR/purity).
All interactive elements have data-testid — excellent for testability.
App.js mounts Toaster outside BrowserRouter — works, but conventionally Toaster placement is fine either way; no issue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero landing page is fully working at /. Verified: navbar visibility + all 6 nav links (about/services/team/hqs/faqs/reviews) + brand-left 'SAY YOUR NAME' + right brand 'LUMI AI' + 'Build With AI' CTA; hero heading 'AI AS SERVICE'; subtitle 'Yu Know the Business. We Know the AI.'; 'Since 2023' badge; all 4 metric cards (100+ Delivered, 5 Countries, 10K$+ MRR, Shipped Velocity); landmark skyline present; AI command bar placeholder cycles via typewriter (verified text changed from 'I want a MCP' to 'I want a Personal Agent' within 7s); typing + clicking Run shows sonner toast 'Signal received.'; clicking navbar 'Build With AI' focuses ai-command-input AND shows 'Tell the lab what you want to build.' toast; hero-cta-build clickable. No console errors. Toast/CTA visual overlap is the only minor UX nit.
rca of the issue: No bugs found; nothing to RCA.
